strengths: 20 years of software engineering experience across web, mobile, infrastructure, and emerging AI domains, exceeding the 15-year requirement
Demonstrated director-level technical leadership through multiple Staff positions and founding GISCollective, an active open-source platform with real-world adoption
Current focus on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq shows recent engagement with cutting-edge AI technologies and agentic workflows
concerns: No demonstrated expertise in AI/ML product development or AI-powered platform strategy; background centers on infrastructure, geospatial systems, and web services
Lacks the preferred Master's degree or PhD in AI-related fields; education is in Computer Science and Fine Arts, not AI/ML specialization
Career breadth across many domains may indicate lack of strategic depth in AI; most long-term independent work (GISCollective since 2016) focuses on geospatial rather than AI innovation

key_factors.factor: AI expertise and demonstrated AI-powered products
20 years of technical leadership at Staff level across multiple roles
Recent AI infrastructure work at re:cinq

response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong technical leadership credentials with 20 years of engineering experience and multiple Staff-level roles, meeting the seniority baseline. However, the role explicitly requires 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI' and preferably advanced degrees in AI fields. His background, while technically strong and diverse, shows breadth across infrastructure, cloud, and geospatial domains rather than strategic depth in AI/ML. Recent AI-agent infrastructure work is promising but too nascent to demonstrate the level of AI strategic expertise required for a director-level AI strategy principal engineer.
